title: XIFT v1.0 XiftSemanticQuery (Channel 5 SDR)
description: The Semantic Discovery Request a querier sends to a peer (or Custodian) to find experience by meaning. POST /xift/v1/sdr. Signed with Ed25519 over JCS(query minus query_signature). In peer-to-peer Flow A the same query is scatter-gathered across N peers (§9). Bounded by sdr_query_size_max (4 KB, §11), enforced at the protocol layer, not by this schema. Source: xift-1.0-spec-channel-5.md §3, §4.

query_id.description: Unique identifier for this query; echoed in the response.

query_text.description: Natural-language statement of need. MUST be PII-redacted before sending (§10).

query_embedding.description: OPTIONAL. Pre-computed embedding so the responder can skip server-side encoding. Requires embedding_model.

embedding_model.description: Identifier of the embedding model used. REQUIRED when query_embedding is present.

bloom_required_capabilities.description: OPTIONAL. Bloom filter of capabilities the responder MUST have (sub-millisecond pre-filter).

constraints.description: Constraints on acceptable responders and returned artifacts (§4). max_classification / max_pii_classification are egress constraints (§4, core §8.4).

min_trust_score.description: Responder trust score MUST be >= this.

max_classification.description: Returned artifacts MUST have classification <= this.

max_pii_classification.description: Returned artifacts MUST have pii_classification <= this (anonymized < pseudonymized < personal-identifiable).

max_results.description: Maximum candidate matches to return. Absolute cap sdr_max_results_hard_cap = 50 (§11).

max_latency_ms.description: Cutoff for waiting on responses; partial results accepted. Default sdr_max_latency_default_ms = 2000 (§11).

max_cost_per_result.description: OPTIONAL billing constraint (§4.1). Responders priced above this are excluded.

amount.description: Decimal amount as a string to preserve precision.
amount.x-xift-note: String-typed on purpose: avoids float rounding and keeps JCS/RFC 8785 canonicalization of the signed query reproducible.

policy_tags_required.description: OPTIONAL. Tags the responding artifacts MUST carry. MUST align with purpose_of_use (§10).

scope_redaction_applied.description: Asserts the querier has redacted PII from query_text (§10). Falsely asserting true is a policy violation (policy:channel5:preview_redaction_insufficient, 204).

ontology.description: OPTIONAL vocabulary descriptor (§7.1, ADR-XIFT-ONTOLOGY-001). When present, the responder computes vocabulary-aware semantic_alignment. Absence carries no Channel-5 penalty; unresolved alignment escalates to Channel 7 (SCS).

query_signature.description: Base64url Ed25519 signature over JCS(query minus this field). Responders MUST verify before processing (§3).

signing_key_id.description: DID URL fragment identifying the signing key.
